display.purpose: Garment names, recommendation labels, onboarding headlines, editorial story lines. The app's voice at its most expressive.

headline.purpose: Card-level headings, suggestion labels ('First thought', 'Wild card'). Editorial weight at the card scale.

title.purpose: Navigation bar titles, primary action button copy. The grotesk at its most authoritative.

body.purpose: Supporting copy, occasion descriptions, rationale text, brand names. The default reading voice.

label.purpose: Kickers, captions, metadata. Always uppercase, always tracked. The signal voice.

shadows.name: hero-lift
shadows.purpose: Structural lift for GarmentCard full-bleed photo heroes. The only shadow in the system.

motion.name: standard
motion.purpose: Default transition for content reveal, loading state changes, tab switches.

motion.name: press-feedback
motion.purpose: Scale press feedback on CTAButton (scaleEffect 0.97). Immediate tactile response.

motion.name: typewriter
motion.purpose: Loading copy for the recommendations ritual. Only performative animation in the app.

components.name: Primary Button (CTAButton)
components.description: Full-width ink-fill pill. The only primary action affordance across the app.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: block; width: 100%; background: #1C1A17; color: #F6F4EF; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; font-weight: 600; padding: 0 24px; height: 52px; border: none; border-radius: 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.12s ease-out, opacity 0.12s ease-out; letter-spacing: 0; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.88; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: default; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Full-width outline pill. Pairs with CTAButton when two actions share a screen.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: block; width: 100%; background: #FCFBF8; color: #1C1A17; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; font-weight: 600; padding: 0 24px; height: 50px; border: 1px solid rgba(28,26,23,0.25); border-radius: 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #F6F4EF; }

components.name: Chip — Active
components.description: Selected filter/occasion chip. Ink fill capsule.
components.css: .ds-chip { font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; padding: 7px 14px; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s ease; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-chip--active { background: #1C1A17; color: #F6F4EF; border: 1px solid #1C1A17; } .ds-chip--inactive { background: transparent; color: #6B655C; border: 1px solid rgba(28,26,23,0.10); } .ds-chip--inactive:hover { border-color: rgba(28,26,23,0.25); }

components.name: Chip — Inactive
components.description: Unselected filter/occasion chip. Hairline border capsule.
components.css: .ds-chip { font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; padding: 7px 14px; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s ease; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-chip--inactive { background: transparent; color: #6B655C; border: 1px solid rgba(28,26,23,0.10); } .ds-chip--inactive:hover { border-color: rgba(28,26,23,0.25); color: #1C1A17; }

components.name: Content Card (drapeCard)
components.description: Standard grouped content card. Surface fill, 0.5pt hairline, no shadow.
components.html:
First thought
Navy linen blazer
Rag & Bone · Formal
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FCFBF8; border-radius: 18px; border: 0.5px solid rgba(28,26,23,0.10); padding: 16px; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; } .ds-card-mono-label { font-family: monospace; font-size: 9px; font-weight: 400; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; color: #A8A095; margin-bottom: 6px; } .ds-card-serif-title { font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 500; color: #1C1A17; margin-bottom: 4px; letter-spacing: 0.01em; } .ds-card-body { font-size: 13px; color: #6B655C; }

components.name: Garment Card (Hero Photo)
components.description: Full-bleed 3:4 photo hero with bottom glass caption strip and structural shadow.
components.html:
Outerwear
Navy Linen Blazer
Rag & Bone
components.css: .ds-garment-card { position: relative; border-radius: 24px; overflow: hidden; aspect-ratio: 3/4; box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); } .ds-garment-card-photo { width: 100%; height: 100%; background: linear-gradient(160deg, #C8C3BA 0%, #8D8880 100%); } .ds-garment-card-caption { position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; padding: 14px 16px; background: rgba(252,251,248,0.72); backdrop-filter: blur(20px) saturate(1.8); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px) saturate(1.8); } .ds-garment-card-category { font-family: monospace; font-size: 9px; font-weight: 400; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; color: #A8A095; margin-bottom: 3px; } .ds-garment-card-name { font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif; font-size: 22px; font-weight: 500; color: #1C1A17; letter-spacing: 0.01em; } .ds-garment-card-brand { font-size: 13px; color: #6B655C; margin-top: 2px; }

components.name: Circle Icon Button
components.description: 44pt circular icon button. Surface fill, hairline border, ink icon. Used for add/close/refresh.
components.html: <button class="ds-circle-btn" aria-label="Add"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none"><path d="M8 3v10M3 8h10" stroke="#1C1A17" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-circle-btn { width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 50%; background: #FCFBF8; border: 1px solid rgba(28,26,23,0.10); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.12s ease, border-color 0.12s ease; } .ds-circle-btn:hover { background: #F6F4EF; border-color: rgba(28,26,23,0.20); } .ds-circle-btn:active { transform: scale(0.94); }

components.name: Mono Label
components.description: Uppercase tracked monospace kicker. The signal voice. Never sentence-case, never above 13px.
components.css: .ds-mono-label { font-family: monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 400; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; color: #A8A095; display: block; line-height: 1; }

components.name: Serif Display Text
components.description: Newsreader medium headline. For garment names, occasion headers, story lines.
components.css: .ds-serif-display { font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif; font-size: 22px; font-weight: 500; color: #1C1A17; line-height: 1.2; letter-spacing: 0.01em; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview: Drape is a morning-ritual tool. Its visual system is built around a single premise: the interface should step back so the clothes can come forward. Every design decision is judged against the question

— which means clarity over cleverness, confidence over ornamentation, and warmth that comes from craft rather than decoration.

The three-family type stack — Newsreader serif for display and story lines, Hanken Grotesk for body and UI, Spline Sans Mono for kickers and captions — carries all the brand expression. Color is deliberately absent. The palette runs from near-black warm ink to warm off-white paper, adaptive to light and dark mode, with no accent color. Hierarchy is established through size, weight, and opacity alone. When the clothes appear, they are the only color.

This system explicitly rejects the clinical wardrobe-tracker aesthetic: no spreadsheet energy, no row-after-row density without warmth, no empty-state apology screens.
keyCharacteristics: Achromatic interface — no accent color; garment colors are the only color
Editorial serif + grotesk + mono triple-stack for a well-dressed typographic hierarchy
Warm adaptive neutrals (light: paper/surface/raised/ink; dark: inverted counterparts)
Flat-by-default elevation with hairline card borders; structural shadow reserved for hero photo cards only
Swift-native motion at 150–350 ms, always with reduce-motion alternatives

rules.name: The No-Accent Rule
rules.body: There is no accent color. The interface is achromatic so that garments — the actual subject — are the only color. Adding a teal action color or a terracotta highlight is prohibited. Hierarchy is weight, size, and opacity.

rules.name: The Warm Undertone Rule
rules.body: Every neutral is warm-biased: ink is #1C1A17 (not #111111), paper is #F6F4EF (not #FAFAFA). Pure grays are forbidden. The warm cast is the brand's only color expression.

rules.name: The Three-Voice Rule
rules.body: Newsreader is for story. Hanken Grotesk is for system. Spline Sans Mono is for signal. Do not assign a voice to a role that belongs to another.

rules.name: The Mono-Is-Signal Rule
rules.body: MonoLabel appears on information the user needs to scan, not read. It is not a decorative style. Its rarity is part of the signal.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Cards are flat at rest. Depth is tonal: surface (#FCFBF8) on paper (#F6F4EF), separated by a 0.5pt hairline in Theme.line. Shadows are not added to convey 'this is a card.'

rules.name: The One Shadow Rule
rules.body: Drop shadow appears only on GarmentCard — the full-bleed photo hero. No other component gets a shadow.

dos: Do use Theme.ink and Theme.paper for all text and background values. Never hardcode hex colors.
Do use Newsreader for garment names, recommendation labels, occasion headers.
Do apply MonoLabel for kickers and captions. Uppercase, tracked, faint.
Do use drapeCard() modifier for all grouped content cards.
Do reserve the drop shadow for full-bleed photo heroes (GarmentCard).
Do use CTAButton for every primary action. One look, everywhere.
donts: Don't introduce an accent color. The interface is achromatic; garments provide the only color.
Don't use pure #111111 or #FAFAFA grays. Every neutral must have the warm undertone.
Don't use Newsreader in buttons, labels, or nav titles.
Don't use Spline Sans Mono in sentence-case or at sizes above 13px.
Don't add a second or decorative shadow. The One Shadow Rule is global.
Don't nest drapeCard inside drapeCard. Nested cards are always wrong.
Don't build a clinical wardrobe-tracker feel: no dense spreadsheet rows, no cold empty states that just report absence.
Don't add gamification: no streak counters, no badge indicators, no progress rings.
Don't use system .borderedProminent or .bordered button styles.
Don't add a loading spinner in the center of content.
